feature_descriptions.bind_rate: interface bind attempts per source over the window (interface scanning)
feature_descriptions.distinct_interfaces: distinct interfaces bound per host over the window
feature_descriptions.distinct_opnums: distinct operations per host over the window (recon / lateral)
feature_descriptions.fault_rate: fault / error responses per source over the window (access-denied probing)
feature_descriptions.interface_uuid: frequency-encoded interface UUID (drsuapi / svcctl / atsvc / samr = tooling)
feature_descriptions.opnum: encoded operation number within the interface
feature_descriptions.request_rate: DCERPC requests per source over the window

schema_description: Suricata DCERPC set: interface UUID and opnum plus per-host recon and lateral-movement rates
